# SOVEREIGN OS ARCHITECTURAL MANIFEST (2026)

## 1. DATA TAXONOMY (PRISMA DOMAINS)

### A. Property & Tenancy Registry
*   **Property**: Master asset container (Organization 1:N Property).
*   **Unit**: Physical inventory within a Property (Property 1:N Unit).
*   **Tenant**: Resident identity (Organization 1:N Tenant).
*   **Lease**: Temporal contract binding Tenant to Unit (Unit 1:N Lease).
*   **Charge**: Fiscal obligation generated by Lease (Lease 1:N Charge).
*   **MeterReading**: Resource consumption tracking (Unit 1:N MeterReading).

### B. Treasury & Wealth Engine
*   **FinancialLedger**: Logical grouping for expense/income categories.
*   **Account**: Double-entry ledger anchor (ASSET, INCOME, EXPENSE, LIABILITY, EQUITY).
*   **Transaction**: Atomic wrapper for balanced ledger entries.
*   **LedgerEntry**: Discrete debit/credit record linked to a Transaction.
*   **WealthAccount**: Personal fiscal silos for non-operational assets.
*   **IncomeSource**: Categorization for auxiliary revenue streams.
*   **CategorizationRule**: Keyword-based auto-reconciliation logic.

### C. Governance & Identity
*   **Organization**: Primary isolation vault for all data (SaaS Root).
*   **OrganizationMember**: RBAC bridge (OWNER, ADMIN, MANAGER, VIEWER).
*   **User**: Global identity capable of joining multiple Organizations.
*   **AuditLog**: Immutable forensic trail of all sensitive mutations.
*   **IdempotencyRecord**: Execution guard to prevent double-billing.
*   **Invitation**: Organization recruitment protocol.
*   **ReportSnapshot**: Secured, temporal links for financial document sharing.

## 2. ROUTING MATRIX (NEXT.JS 15+)

### (Tenant) Scope • Operational Command
*   `/home`: Executive dashboard.
*   `/assets`: Property & Unit registry.
*   `/tenants`: Tenant dossiers & forensic ledgers.
*   `/treasury`: Cash flow, receivables, and payables orchestration.
*   `/treasury/command-center`: High-stakes manual billing triggers.
*   `/wealth`: Personal wealth accounts & transfers.
*   `/governance/ledger`: Master double-entry reconciliation.
*   `/reports`: Analytical matrix & document generation.
*   `/settings`: Vault configuration & team management.

### (Admin) Scope • Global Oversight
*   `/admin`: System-wide health dashboard.
*   `/admin/tenants`: Cross-organization tenant overview.
*   `/admin/audit`: The Panopticon (Global Forensic Audit trail).

### (API) Scope • Integration & Automation
*   `/api/auth/[...nextauth]`: Identity protocol.
*   `/api/ledger`: External transaction ingestion.
*   `/api/cron/billing`: Automated billing materialization.
*   `/api/reports/[format]`: Multi-format document synthesis.

## 3. CORE LOGIC & SERVICES

### Primary Server Actions (`actions/`)
*   `runMonthlyBillingCycle`: Triggers the recurring revenue engine for a period.
*   `processPayment`: Initiates the Waterfall Priority liquidation protocol.
*   `logExpense`: Injects balanced debit/credit entries into the ledger.
*   `executeGlobalIdentityMigration`: Synchronizes legacy User/Org mappings.

### Core Service Layer (`src/services/`)
*   `billing.ts`: `runMonthlyBillingCycleService` (Iterative batch generation).
*   `reconciliation.ts`: `processPaymentService` (Atomic debt liquidation).
*   `core.ts`: `createBalancedTransaction` (Zero-sum ledger enforcement).
*   `analytics.service.ts`: Macro-health and collection velocity metrics.

### Financial Algorithms (`src/core/algorithms/`)
*   `finance.ts`: `calculateWaterfallDistribution` (Priority: Late Fee > Utility > Rent).
*   `tenancy.ts`: Pro-rata rent calculation and lease aging logic.

---
**END MANIFEST**
